description: A ground-level photograph depicts a landscape dominated by a large, rugged bare rock formation or outcrop, extending from the lower left to the upper right of the frame, under a bright, hazy blue sky. The rocks are light brown to reddish-brown, appearing dry and weathered. Sparse, greyish-green, low-lying scrub vegetation is visible in the foreground and near the base of the rock formation, indicating areas with little high vegetation. The ground in the immediate foreground is sandy or dusty. This image illustrates the land cover type "Bare rocks and outcrops" as defined in the document.
